top_risks.reasons: [LLM] Matches configured high-risk list with adequate support (52 reads, not FP). Trend is stable (not sharply increasing) so High, not Critical. Recommend confirmatory RT-qPCR/amplicon sequencing before action.
[LLM] Norovirus matches the configured high-risk list with adequate support (26 reads, not FP). Stable trend so High, not Critical. Recommend orthogonal RT-qPCR confirmation.
[LLM] Non-phage, non-high-risk-list virus with substantial support (116 reads, no FP flag). Enteric adenovirus is commonly shed in stool; flagged Medium but not a configured high-risk target.
[LLM] Non-phage, not on high-risk list; substantial support (26 reads). Common seasonal human coronavirus — Medium.
[LLM] Non-phage, not on high-risk list; substantial support (20 reads). Common seasonal coronavirus — Medium.
